channel.title: Coastal Credit Union Community Events
channel.description: Community events sponsored by Coastal Credit Union

item.title: Annual Meeting & Election of Directors (Apr 27, 2026 | 7:00 pm — 8:30 pm)
item.description:
Date: Apr 27, 2026 | 7:00 pm — 8:30 pm
Location: Coastal Credit Union Headquarters - Conference Room 204

Our Annual Meeting is an essential event for the credit union, as member participation is what sets cooperatives like ours apart from other types of businesses.

item.title: Sip, Savor, and Celebrate at Durham South Square Branch (Mar 26, 2026 | 4:00 pm — 7:00 pm)
item.description:
Date: Mar 26, 2026 | 4:00 pm — 7:00 pm
Location: Durham South Square Branch

Join us as we celebrate a significant milestone: 40 Years of Durham South Square serving our community.
